rules.rule_text:
title: Rundll32 without Command Line
id: 48bd57e9-1b2b-4be9-a2aa-5fccbe86b136
status: experimental
description: Detects instances of rundll32.exe with no command line that spawns a
  child process. Inspired by the 2022 Red Canary Threat Detection report.
references:
- https://redcanary.com/threat-detection-report/techniques/rundll32/
author: Micah Babinski
date: 2022/11/03
tags:
- attack.defense_evasion
- attack.t1218
- attack.t1218.011
logsource:
  category: process_creation
  product: windows
detection:
  selection:
    ParentCommandLine:
    - rundll32.exe
    - rundll32
    - null
    ParentImage|endswith: \rundll32.exe
  condition: selection
falsepositives:
- Unknown
level: medium
